name: Ring of death
hoverSummary: Hydrix ring with survival and adrenaline-on-kill effects.
detailLines: Examine: When wearing this ring, you will revive but take increasing damage over time, and have a chance to gain adrenaline upon killing your enemy.
When a target is killed, there is a chance to restore adrenaline.
Not a core ranged DPS ring, but relevant for wider setup comparisons.
